title: Craftable Uncraftable
body:
Craftable uncraftable Makes many of the uncraftable items craftable, but also not making any of them too op
Recipes include:

tridents: 2 sticks and three diamonds

saddles: 4 leather and iron ingot

Diamond, gold, and iron horse armor: same way as leather but with iron gold or diamond

noch apples: 8 gold blocks and apple

chainmail boots: 4 chains

chainmail leggings: 7 chains

chainmail chestplate: 8 chains

chainmail helmet: 5 chains
